name: Beef Stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a Crock-Pot.
2. Add enough water to cover the ingredients.
3. Cover and cook on Low for 12 to 24 hours or on High for 4 to 6 hours.
4. If cooked on High, the stock will be lighter in color and less concentrated.
5. Strain the stock through a fine mesh sieve into a clean container.
6. Refrigerate the strained stock.
7. The stock keeps well for 4 to 5 days or may be frozen.
8. This recipe makes approximately 8 cups of strained stock.
